description: Agents choose chronologically, read one shared road state, and immediately publish endogenous ride-hailing traffic for later Agents.

shared_traffic_state.interpretation: Each simulated Agent represents 120 similar trips in this mechanism demonstration. Only a chosen ride-hailing trip adds an endogenous vehicle; scheduled buses are exogenous base flow.

scope_notes: This is a mechanism and sensitivity experiment, not a calibrated Shanghai traffic forecast.
A decision affects later decisions only when corridor, direction, and time bin match.
The chronological update is intentionally order-sensitive; the stable tie-breaker makes it reproducible.
The existing formal batch-feedback baseline is preserved for comparison.
